_comment: Appends multi-token aliases to attune-help corpus entries without requiring an attune-help release. Mirrors the summaries_override.json mechanism. Aliases are added in addition to (not replacing) the frontmatter aliases. Each appended alias must be 2+ tokens after the retriever's tokenizer + stemmer so it can clear KeywordRetriever.MIN_ALIAS_OVERLAP=2. Within-template duplicates against frontmatter are silently deduped at load time; cross-template alias collisions raise DuplicateAliasError as usual. The alias-expansion-sweep entries (docs/specs/archive/alias-expansion-sweep/) that used to live here were promoted to attune-help template frontmatter in attune-help 0.13.0 (attune-help#9 / attune-help PR #24) — this file stays as the mechanism's stub for future temporary additions. Pre-validate new aliases with attune_rag.retrieval._tokenize.
